phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fresh fish counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de peixe fresco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese restaurants typically direct guests precisely to the fish counter for daily catch selection, favoring concise and professional exchanges.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o terraço vista marina.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo VEESH-tuh muh-REE-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the marina view terrace.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the marina view terrace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo VEESH-tuh muh-REE-nuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o terraço vista marina.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o balcão de peixe fresco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao chefe de sala ou ao responsável; eles podem indicar o caminho para o balcão de peixe fresco.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh OHW OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the head waiter or the manager; they can point you to the fresh fish counter.

responses.english: Ask the head waiter or the manager; they can point you to the fresh fish counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh OHW OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao chefe de sala ou ao responsável; eles podem indicar o caminho para o balcão de peixe fresco.

phrases.text_local: Você poderia me informar sobre o terraço com vista para a marina?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH poo-dih-REEUH MIH een-foo-ruh-MAHR SOHB-rih AW teh-RAH-soo KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AH muh-REE-nuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao chefe de sala; ele conhece os detalhes do terraço.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh; EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih OOSH dih-TAH-lyihsh DOO teh-RAH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the head waiter; he knows the details about the terrace.

responses.english: Ask the head waiter; he knows the details about the terrace.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh; EH-lih koo-NYEH-sih OOSH dih-TAH-lyihsh DOO teh-RAH-soo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao chefe de sala; ele conhece os detalhes do terraço.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de peixe fresco?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo?

likely_response.local: O balcão de peixe fresco está na sala rústica interior. Pode pedir a sugestão do chef ao balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo ehs-TAH NUH SAH-luh ROOSH-tee-kuh een-tih-REEOHR. PAW-dih pih-DEER AH soo-zhihsh-TOWN DOO SHEHF OW bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: The fresh fish counter is in the rustic interior room. You can ask for the chef's suggestion at the counter.

responses.english: The fresh fish counter is in the rustic interior room. You can ask for the chef's suggestion at the counter.
responses.phonetic: AW bahl-KOWN DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo ehs-TAH NUH SAH-luh ROOSH-tee-kuh een-tih-REEOHR. PAW-dih pih-DEER AH soo-zhihsh-TOWN DOO SHEHF OW bahl-KOWN.
responses.local: O balcão de peixe fresco está na sala rústica interior. Pode pedir a sugestão do chef ao balcão.
